projects.title: Research & Health Tools
projects.problem: People struggle to interpret basic health markers and daily wellness signals in a structured way.
projects.whyItMatters: Clear, simple tools can improve consistency in habits and decision-making without adding cognitive load.

projects.title: Automation Systems
projects.problem: Teams and individuals waste time repeating low-leverage workflows across operations and planning.
projects.whyItMatters: Automation frameworks free up attention for higher-order thinking and creative work.

projects.title: Finance & Analysis Frameworks
projects.problem: Financial decisions are often made with fragmented assumptions and no consistent analytical framework.
projects.whyItMatters: Structured models create better trade-offs, better clarity, and fewer avoidable mistakes.
